raw_text:
Understood. This handoff is structurally complete and authoritative.

For the new session, use this conversation title:

Phase 19 — Final E2E Integrity Closure (Round 5 Command Supervision)

When the next sweep report arrives, I will:

Evaluate FAIL set by architectural class (atomicity, envelope, projection, governance, concurrency).

Map each remaining failure to a one-way or two-way door per Constitution v1.3.

Enforce stop-the-line rules exactly as defined.

Either:

Declare Phase 19 CLOSED, or

Define Round 6 minimal remediation beads (surgically targeted, no broad refactors).

Awaiting updated sweep:

Code
cargo test -p e2e-tests --no-fail-fast

Provide raw signal only:

PASS

FAIL

IGNORED

Failure list with error snippets

We proceed from there.
